queries.question: What photography is being shown at the Museum of Modern Art and what paintings are also being shown there?
queries.sql:
SELECT Photography.title
FROM Gallery JOIN Photography ON Gallery.GalleryId = Photography.GalleryId
WHERE Gallery.Name = "MoMA - Museum of Modern Art"
UNION
SELECT Painting.title
FROM Gallery JOIN Painting ON Gallery.GalleryId = Painting.GalleryId
WHERE Gallery.Name = "MoMA - Museum of Modern Art"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?gallery a :Gallery .
    ?photography a :Photography .
    ?photography p:hasGallery ?gallery .
    ?photography p:Title ?title .
    ?gallery p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "MoMA - Museum of Modern Art")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?gallery a :Gallery .
    ?painting a :Painting .
    ?painting p:hasGallery ?gallery .
    ?painting p:Title ?title .
    ?gallery p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "MoMA - Museum of Modern Art")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all photographs and also provide a list of paintings being show at the Museum of Modern Art.
queries.sql:
SELECT Photography.title
FROM Gallery JOIN Photography ON Gallery.GalleryId = Photography.GalleryId
UNION
SELECT Painting.title
FROM Gallery JOIN Painting ON Gallery.GalleryId = Painting.GalleryId
WHERE Gallery.Name = "MoMA - Museum of Modern Art"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?gallery a :Gallery .
    ?photography a :Photography .
    ?photography p:hasGallery ?gallery .
    ?photography p:Title ?title .
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?gallery a :Gallery .
    ?painting a :Painting .
    ?painting p:hasGallery ?gallery .
    ?painting p:Title ?title .
    ?gallery p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "MoMA - Museum of Modern Art")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List photographs and paintings being shown at the Museum of Modern Art.
